title: Longest Repeating Character Replacement
output_format: The length of the longest substring containing the same letter you can get after replacing up to `k` characters.
constraints:
- `1 <= s.length <= 10^5`
- `s` consists of only uppercase English letters.
- `0 <= k <= s.length`
function_signature: function characterReplacement(s: string, k: number): number {}
